title: Porpax extinctoria
taxonomy: Porpax extinctoria belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as a type of orchid. The genus Porpax is a small group of orchids and Porpax extinctoria is one of its species. It is also classified in the subtribe Aeridinae, which is a subcategory of the subfamily Epidendroideae. Within the subtribe Aeridinae, Porpax extinctoria is further distinguished by its unique characteristics and growth habits. Further classification of the species is still being researched and refined by botanists.

More extensive studies are required to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential applications.
